notes: Two-leg Brent/CADJPY oil-exporter versus oil-importer return-spread reversion basket from the approved EIA-BOC-BOJ-XBR-CADJPY-2026 card. The EA runs from the XBRUSD.DWX host setfile and reads both D1 close series to compute log-return spread over a fixed lookback. Q02 must evaluate the logical basket, not the standalone legs.
